title: Recurring Snake Sightings Threatening Barangay Residents
abstract: Multiple venomous and non-venomous snakes have been spotted in residential areas, posing a serious safety risk to children and elderly residents. Sightings are increasing due to nearby construction disturbing natural habitats.
problem_solved: Lack of community snake awareness, no local wildlife response team, and absence of safe relocation protocols for displaced snakes in urban barangays.
caption: Photos of snake sightings reported by local residents near the barangay.
